title: Quality
subtitle: small rule set
description: Reviewed quality module: numbered markdown checks with 001 as the base rule, lightweight quality evidence, and rule-usage profiling.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Quality module entrypoint: rule selection, group boundaries, numbered checks, evidence recording, and profiling.

children.title: Quality Checks Surface
children.description: Presents quality checks browser surface.

children.title: quality.css
children.description: Quality Checks page styling for filters, group sections, check cards, and responsive layout.

children.title: quality.js
children.description: Quality Checks browser behavior for loading the catalog API, filtering groups/checks, and copying rule IDs or agent requests.

children.title: catalog.mjs
children.description: Reads quality group README files and numbered rule markdown files into a catalog consumed by the Quality Checks browser surface and API.

children.title: nt-quality-checks
children.description: Codex-discoverable quality-check skill that routes agents through AI Studio quality groups, matching rule files, outcome logging, and usage profiling.

children.title: Rule Groups
children.subtitle: numbered checks
children.description: Grouped quality rules. Read each matching group README, use the 001 rule when it matches, then only the higher-numbered checks needed for the task.

children.title: Player Clarity Rules
children.subtitle: QCLR
children.description: Rules for UI/UX, HUD, scene clarity, sprite readability/state clarity, feedback, interactive elements, responsive viewports, virtual controls, and player-facing presentation.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Player Clarity rule group router for screen state, responsive viewports, and virtual controls.

children.title: QCLR_001 Player Clarity
children.description: Check basic player-facing clarity: visible output, readable important information, visible actions and objects, and understandable next action.

children.title: QCLR_002 Responsive Viewports
children.description: Check 4:3, 16:9, and tall-phone viewport/orientation layouts for cropped, hidden, overlapped, or misplaced player-facing UI.

children.title: QCLR_003 Virtual Controls
children.description: Check mobile/touch controls, virtual buttons, joystick zones, and control hints for visibility, reachability, overlap, and clarity.

children.title: Art Rules
children.subtitle: QART
children.description: Rules for player-facing visuals, generated art, screenshots, visual targets, and avoiding debug/placeholder defaults.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Art rule group router for player-facing visuals, generated art, screenshots, visual targets, and style/appearance fit.

children.title: QART_001 Closest Practical Visual
children.description: Check that player-facing visuals do not default to debug shapes, placeholder art, or temporary overlays when a better visual can be created, sourced, or adapted.

children.title: GDD Rules
children.subtitle: QGDD
children.description: Rules for design source packages, source order, file roles, contradictions, requirements, acceptance criteria, and implementation-facing specs.

children.title: README.md
children.description: GDD rule group router for design source packages, source order, file roles, cross-file contradictions, and acceptance proof.

children.title: QGDD_001 Design Source Readiness
children.description: Check GDD/spec/table/data/handoff packages as current source of truth: entrypoint, file roles, decisions, open questions, contradictions, and proof.

children.title: Game Design Rules
children.subtitle: QDES
children.description: Rules for playable loops, player motivation, economy, progression, feature fit, rewards, challenge, first slices, and design data.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Game design rule group router for gameplay loops, motivation, economy, progression, rewards, challenge, first slices, and design data.

children.title: QDES_001 Playable Loop
children.description: Check gameplay model, player action, system response, visible progress/reward, repeat reason, next hook, dead/confusing states, and feature fit.

children.title: Technical Rules
children.subtitle: QTECH
children.description: Rules for code, scripts, generated data, runtime behavior, build/run proof, input, state, save/load, packaging, and automation.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Technical rule group router for QTECH_001 behavior evidence.

children.title: QTECH_001 Behavior Evidence
children.description: Check changed technical claims with the narrowest useful proof: test, command, parser/schema, build/pack, launch/smoke, scenario, log, or generated-output check.

children.title: Asset Rules
children.subtitle: QASSET
children.description: Rules for sourced, generated, and prepared assets; provenance; licenses; manifests; publishability; game-use-ready formats; and material readiness.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset rule group router for added/changed assets, project-use, publishability, game-use-ready, player-facing, and material-dependent claims.

children.title: QASSET_001 Asset Readiness
children.description: Check accepted/project assets for source/provenance/origin, committed integrity, license/publish routing, project-local paths, runtime format/path, and load/render proof.

children.title: QASSET_002 Material Readiness
children.description: Check material-dependent assets for textures, UVs, colors, material maps, material assignment, and stage-appropriate material proof.

children.title: profile.mjs
children.description: Scans task logs for Quality rule outcome lines and summarizes rule usage, pass, block, review, and skip counts.

children.title: profile.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies quality profiler contracts.

children.title: catalog.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies quality catalog contracts.
